title: Seeker Strike
description:
Deal 9 damage.
Choose 1 of 3 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Deal 12 damage.
Choose 1 of 3 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Shuffles the draw pile before selecting cards for consistency.
